episodes.title: Epstein came to my office and told me to stop publishing stories, says Tina Brown
episodes.description:
Tina Brown reveals Jeffrey Epstein came to her office to threaten her after she published stories exposing his sweetheart deal in 2008.

The journalist says Epstein told her, "you just stop, you stop," in what she describes as a sinister encounter, highlighting the dangers faced by reporters investigating powerful figures.

Read more: https://news.sky.com/topic/jeffrey-epstein-8219/1

episodes.title: Mandelson Vetting: 'PM should consider his position' says Diane Abbott
episodes.description:
The Independent MP for Hackney North and Stoke Newington Diane Abbott,  has told Sky News that it is "inconceivable that number 10 didn't know Peter Mandelson had failed his security vetting for his role as US ambassador".

Abbott went on to say that it has "always been the process, that if you mislead the house, then you must step down". 

Watch the interview in full: 

Read more: https://news.sky.com/story/politics-latest-wes-streeting-doctors-strike-labour-keir-starmer-iran-war-12593360

episodes.title: Royal commentator Jennie Bond says situation for royals 'is on a par with Diana's death'
episodes.description:
The royal family is facing a "very grave situation" with the public reaction to the Andrew allegations as strong as that following the death of Princess Diana, according to royal commentator Jennie Bond.

Buckingham Palace was forced to issue a statement yesterday voicing the King's "profound concern" over the allegations against his brother. It said the palace was ready to support a police investigation into Andrew's dealings with Epstein.

The King has already stripped Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor of his Dukedom, removed his titles and kicked him out of his house on the Windsor estate.

Read more: https://news.sky.com/story/why-palace-chose-to-issue-extraordinary-statement-over-andrew-allegations-13505500

#skynews #ridgeandfrost #royalfamily
